2605.23572.title: HARNESS-LM: A Three-Phase Training Recipe for Harnessing SLMs in Sponsored Search Retrieval
2605.23572.paper_summary: In the competitive landscape of sponsored search, balancing retrieval quality with production latency is a critical challenge. While large retrieval models based on Small Language Models (SLMs) such as Qwen3-Embedding-4B/8B set strong upper bounds on public benchmarks, their deployment in high-throughput, latency-sensitive environments remains impractical. In this paper, we present HARNESS-LM (HLM), a three-phase training framework for transferring the capabilities of large-scale retrievers into compact, cost-efficient models. The approach comprises: (1) training a high-performance reference ("teacher") retriever by fine-tuning a billion-parameter-scale SLM; (2) aligning query representations via an L2 objective to distill knowledge into a sub-600M parameter student encoder; and (3) applying a final contrastive refinement stage to optimize the student for retrieval performance. We also present a comprehensive empirical study of key design choices, including alignment objectives, embedding dimensionality, model scale, architecture, and optimization strategies, to identify configurations that are most effective in production settings. On a real-world Bing Ads evaluation benchmark, HLM recovers over 98% of the reference retriever's precision across multiple settings, while delivering up to 27x lower online query-encoder latency and 20x higher throughput on NVIDIA A100 GPUs. Online A/B testing on Bing Ads further shows a +1% Revenue, +0.6% Impression, and +0.4% Click uplift over the current ensemble of retrievers running in production with the deployed 190M parameter model, clearly highlighting the practical efficacy of the HLM recipe in a real-world sponsored search setting.
2605.23572.paper_summary_zh: 在贊助搜索的競爭環境中，平衡檢索質量與生產延遲是一項關鍵挑戰。雖然基於小型語言模型（SLMs）的大型檢索模型，如Qwen3-Embedding-4B/8B，在公共基準上設置了強大的上限，但在高通量、對延遲敏感的環境中部署它們仍然不切實際。在本文中，我們提出了HARNESS-LM（HLM），這是一個三階段的訓練框架，用於將大型檢索器的能力轉移到緊湊且成本效益高的模型中。該方法包括：（1）通過微調十億參數規模的SLM來訓練高性能的參考（“教師”）檢索器；（2）通過L2目標對查詢表示進行對齊，以將知識提煉到一個小於600M參數的學生編碼器中；以及（3）應用最終的對比精煉階段來優化學生的檢索性能。我們還對關鍵設計選擇進行了全面的實證研究，包括對齊目標、嵌入維度、模型規模、架構和優化策略，以確定在生產環境中最有效的配置。在一個真實世界的Bing廣告評估基準上，HLM在多個設置中恢復了參考檢索器精度的98%以上，同時在NVIDIA A100 GPU上提供了高達27倍的在線查詢編碼器延遲降低和20倍的吞吐量。對Bing廣告的在線A/B測試進一步顯示，相較於目前在生產中運行的190M參數模型的檢索器集成，HLM帶來了+1%的收入、+0.6%的展示量和+0.4%的點擊提升，明確突顯了HLM配方在真實世界贊助搜索環境中的實際效能。
2605.23572.author: Vipul Gupta et.al.
2605.23572.authors: Vipul Gupta, Shikhar Mohan, Lakshya Kumar, Pranjal Chitale, Nikit Begwani, Amit Singh, Manik Varma
